refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: glcm = imgraycomatrix(image) glcm = imgraycomatrix(image, levels, offsets)

listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Number of quantized gray levels. Default is 8.
N-by-2 matrix of [dx dy] neighbor offsets. Default is [1 0].
Normalized gray-level co-occurrence matrix, or stack of matrices for multiple offsets.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Counts normalized pairs of quantized gray levels at the requested [x y] offsets. Multiple offsets return a third matrix dimension.

refsection.title: Examples
